# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 113 — Driver

Every person who operates or drives or is in actual physical control of a vehicle. Whenever the terms “chauffeur” or “operator” or “chauffeur’s license” or “operator’s license” are used in this chapter, such terms shall be deemed to mean driver and driver’s license respectively.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
